title: cyclosorus pennigerus
intro: Cyclosorus pennigerus, also known as the pennigerus fern or the Cyclosorus fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus pennigerus include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic to help with urinary issues. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves of the Cyclosorus pennigerus fern can be used in teas or infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
